news.title:
Sonata Software announces changes in senior management roles effective April 1, 2026.
Rajsekhar Datta Roy, Suresh H.P., and Manu Swami appointed as CDO, COO, and CTO respectively.
news.summary:
Sonata Software announces changes in senior management roles effective April 1, 2026.
Rajsekhar Datta Roy, Suresh H.P., and Manu Swami appointed as CDO, COO, and CTO respectively.

news.title: Sonata Software files bankruptcy petition against US retail client over $10.7M dues.
news.summary: Sonata Software files bankruptcy petition against US retail client over $10.7M dues.

news.title:
Sonata Software filed a bankruptcy petition against OBSA in a US court over $10.65M unpaid dues.
The claim impacts Sonata's retail segment; Q4 revenue, PAT likely unaffected due to offsetting factors.
news.summary:
Sonata Software filed a bankruptcy petition against OBSA in a US court over $10.65M unpaid dues.
The claim impacts Sonata's retail segment; Q4 revenue, PAT likely unaffected due to offsetting factors.

news.title:
Sonata Software's subsidiary SSNA filed for $10.6mn receivables in US Bankruptcy Court.
The case pertains to Chapter 7 involuntary bankruptcy; Q4 results expected accretive.
news.summary:
Sonata Software's subsidiary SSNA filed for $10.6mn receivables in US Bankruptcy Court.
The case pertains to Chapter 7 involuntary bankruptcy; Q4 results expected accretive.

news.title: Sonata Software Ltd held an analyst call and investor meet.
news.summary: Sonata Software Ltd held an analyst call and investor meet.

news.title:
Sonata Software held investor meetings on Feb 13, 2026, with firms like HDFC AMC and ICICI Prudential.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Sonata Software held investor meetings on Feb 13, 2026, with firms like HDFC AMC and ICICI Prudential.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; details available on the company's website.

news.title:
Sonata Software earned AWS Premier Tier status, showcasing AWS solutions expertise.
Highlights AI-driven modernization and robust cloud transformation capabilities.
news.summary:
Sonata Software earned AWS Premier Tier status, showcasing AWS solutions expertise.
Highlights AI-driven modernization and robust cloud transformation capabilities.

news.title:
Sonata Software sees AI-led growth, with AI forming 14% of its order book, boosting faster project execution and margin stability.
Healthcare and BFSI contribute 30% of revenues, showing strong demand; Q3FY26 PAT grew 21.4% YoY, EBITDA at 19.5%.
news.summary:
Sonata Software sees AI-led growth, with AI forming 14% of its order book, boosting faster project execution and margin stability.
Healthcare and BFSI contribute 30% of revenues, showing strong demand; Q3FY26 PAT grew 21.4% YoY, EBITDA at 19.5%.

news.title: Sonata Software has 32 major deals in the pipeline, typically taking 4-6 quarters to close.
news.summary: Sonata Software has 32 major deals in the pipeline, typically taking 4-6 quarters to close.

news.title:
Sonata Software's Q3 net profit drops 13.3% to ₹104 crore; revenue up 45.4% to ₹3,080 crore.
EBIT rises 18.7% to ₹173.6 crore, but margin declines to 5.6% from 6.9%.
news.summary:
Sonata Software's Q3 net profit drops 13.3% to ₹104 crore; revenue up 45.4% to ₹3,080 crore.
EBIT rises 18.7% to ₹173.6 crore, but margin declines to 5.6% from 6.9%.

news.title:
Sonata Software shares Q3 FY2026 presentation, emphasizing modernization and digital transformation.
Highlights large deals, strong pipeline, sustainability goals, and company footprint.
news.summary:
Sonata Software shares Q3 FY2026 presentation, emphasizing modernization and digital transformation.
Highlights large deals, strong pipeline, sustainability goals, and company footprint.

news.title:
Sonata Software announced its Q3 FY26 Investor Presentation showcasing a 6.1% QoQ increase in consolidated PAT and consistent interim dividend of INR 1.25/share.
International services revenue grew 6.8% YoY, with large deals in BFSI, HLS, and TMT sectors. Domestic GC reported 10.8% QoQ growth.
news.summary:
Sonata Software announced its Q3 FY26 Investor Presentation showcasing a 6.1% QoQ increase in consolidated PAT and consistent interim dividend of INR 1.25/share.
International services revenue grew 6.8% YoY, with large deals in BFSI, HLS, and TMT sectors. Domestic GC reported 10.8% QoQ growth.

news.title:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.
news.summary:
Zensar faces revenue decline as Cisco, one of its top clients, reduces IT vendor partnerships and discretionary spending.
Peers like Hexaware, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, and Sonata also face client pressures, highlighting risks for mid-tier IT firms.

news.title:
Sonata Software's 5-year shareholder returns surged 162%, outpacing EPS growth of 13% annually.
Total shareholder return (TSR) reached 188%, boosted by dividends, despite a 48% drop in the last year.
news.summary:
Sonata Software's 5-year shareholder returns surged 162%, outpacing EPS growth of 13% annually.
Total shareholder return (TSR) reached 188%, boosted by dividends, despite a 48% drop in the last year.

news.title:
Sonata Software to host analyst/investor meet on Dec 8, 2025, at Elara Conference in Bengaluru.
The meeting will follow SEBI norms, sharing only public info without UPSI. Details on the company website.
news.summary:
Sonata Software to host analyst/investor meet on Dec 8, 2025, at Elara Conference in Bengaluru.
The meeting will follow SEBI norms, sharing only public info without UPSI. Details on the company website.

news.title:
Sonata Software drops to 13th in India IT sector after 30% Q2FY26 revenue contraction.
Revenue hit as Microsoft shifts from resellers like Sonata to direct client sales, impacting 60% of revenue.
news.summary:
Sonata Software drops to 13th in India IT sector after 30% Q2FY26 revenue contraction.
Revenue hit as Microsoft shifts from resellers like Sonata to direct client sales, impacting 60% of revenue.

news.title:
Sonata Software beat revenue forecasts by 30%, reporting ₹21b revenue and EPS of ₹4.33, exceeding estimates by 13%.
Analysts adjusted revenue forecast for 2026 to ₹108.6b; consensus target fell 7.9% to ₹400 amid slower growth expectations.
news.summary:
Sonata Software beat revenue forecasts by 30%, reporting ₹21b revenue and EPS of ₹4.33, exceeding estimates by 13%.
Analysts adjusted revenue forecast for 2026 to ₹108.6b; consensus target fell 7.9% to ₹400 amid slower growth expectations.

news.title:
Sonata Software to go ex-dividend on Nov 21; dividend payment set for Dec 13 at INR 1.25/share.
Trailing yield is 1.2%, with dividends covered by profits and free cash flow, indicating sustainability.
news.summary:
Sonata Software to go ex-dividend on Nov 21; dividend payment set for Dec 13 at INR 1.25/share.
Trailing yield is 1.2%, with dividends covered by profits and free cash flow, indicating sustainability.
